title: podman (1) is not on docs.podman.io
body: The main man page for podman (1) is not on the docs.podman.io site and should be as there are a number of global options listed on that man page that are used by a variety of commands and it should be available there along with the other man pages.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

I've not looked at it since dropping this issue so we wouldn't forget it.  I'm not sure where it should live either on the page, but my thought was at least under the commands section along with the other man pages.
@rhatdan not that I'm aware of.  I think we'll need some of @baude 's time to figure out the readthedocs bit.  There's some funkiness there with the main man page and getting it published.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
